chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 2219 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1.For order on MA No. 12071/25 (urgent) 2.For order on MA No. 12072/25 (exemption) 3.For hearing of bail application 29.08.2025 Mr. Bilal Mangi, Advocate a/w 02 Applicants ---------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all exceptions. 3. Applicants Sanaullah son of Peer Muhammad and Izatullah son of Peer Muhammad, are present along with their Counsel to seek protective bail to enable them to appear before the Trial Court for seeking appropriate relief. Learned counsel for applicants submits that applicants are innocent and have been falsely implicated by complainant in Crime No. 665/2025 of PS Darakhshan, Karachi, under sections 3 & 4 of Lawyers Welfare and Protection Act 2023 read with Section 506B/34 PPC, and police has shaken hands with complainant party and it is made difficult for applicants to approach the concerned Court for getting appropriate relief as such they have appeared before this Court for seeking protective bail. Without touching merits of the case, applicants are granted protective bail for 07 working days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.40,000/- each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall remain in force for 07 working days from today or the date on which the applicants will surrender before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The protective bail application is disposed of. J U D G E Ashraf
